data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of 'Quick note dictation during session' but failed to provide concrete evidence that this functionality is supported or operational. The expected result was to confirm the scenario behavior or produce a clear failure report, but the evidence does not demonstrate any successful execution or validation of this scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the specific functionality of note dictation, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of successful execution or validation of the note dictation scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
